top_signals.title: Goldman Strategists Lift S&P 500 Target to 8,000 on AI, Earnings
top_signals.summary: Strategists at Goldman Sachs Group Inc. joined peers at Morgan Stanley and Deutsche Bank AG in seeing a 17% return for the S&P 500 Index this year.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Dulux owner AkzoNobel rejects €13bn attempt to gatecrash merger
top_signals.summary: Shares jump as Nippon Paint and Sherwin-Williams attempt to muscle in on deal between Dutch group and Axalta
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Australia starts ‘high-risk’ life extension of its submarine fleet
top_signals.summary: The Australian National Audit Office (ANAO) has issued a damning verdict on Department of Defence planning for the life-extension program.
